ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location name of the site */,
  "river_mile" REAL /* River mile marker for the site */,
  "station" INTEGER /* Station number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the site */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director or managing entity of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the site is located */,
  "basin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the basin where the site is located */,
  "huc8_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HUC-8 watershed where the site is located */,
  "dec_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DEC region where the site is located */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the water body being monitored */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "wq_standard" TEXT /* Water quality standard compliance status */,
  "drainage_area" REAL /* Drainage area of the site */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Habitat type of the site */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use classification of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_sites_huc8_id FOREIGN KEY ("huc8_id") REFERENCES huc8_watersheds ("huc8_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_sites_basin_id FOREIGN KEY ("basin_id") REFERENCES basins ("basin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_sites_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_sites_dec_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("dec_region_id") REFERENCES dec_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water quality data record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring site from which the sample was taken */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date when the water sample was collected */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter being measured (e.g., pH, dissolved oxygen) */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., mg/L, pH) */,
  "standard_met" INTEGER /* Indicates if the standard for the parameter was met */,
  "sample_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "sample_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "basins" (
  "basin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each basin */,
  "basin_name" TEXT /* Name of the basin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the basin */,
  "basin_type" TEXT /* Type of basin (e.g., watershed, subwatershed) */,
  "size_acres" REAL /* Size of the basin in acres */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("basin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the county is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dec_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DEC region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the DEC region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the regional office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "huc8_watersheds" (
  "huc8_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HUC-8 watershed */,
  "huc8_name" TEXT /* Name of the HUC-8 watershed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watershed */,
  "watershed_type" TEXT /* Type of watershed (e.g., river, lake) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("huc8_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_station_inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring site being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., routine, complaint-based) */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings of the inspection */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken as a result of the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_station_inspections_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter to which the standard applies */,
  "standard_value" REAL /* Value of the standard */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the standard */,
  "standard_type" TEXT /* Type of standard (e.g., maximum, minimum) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)
